description: Top-level site/app navigation primitive. HTML-first wrap or JSON-first .items setter; auto aria-current sync via pathname matching with popstate listener.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Accessible name for the navigation region.

attributes.name: data-match
attributes.description: Pathname matching strictness. 'exact' requires exact match. Default: exact wins, longest prefix breaks ties, first-in-DOM-order breaks remaining ties.

childAttributes.name: href
childAttributes.description: Standard anchor href. Used for both navigation and pathname matching.

childAttributes.name: data-route
childAttributes.description: Optional .current target. Falls back to href when absent.

childAttributes.name: data-nav-link
childAttributes.description: Marks a descendant <a> as a candidate for active-state matching when the link list is wrapped (e.g. inside <li> or <drop-down>). When any descendant carries this attribute, those replace 'direct children' as the candidate set.
